templates.title: Website Development
templates.description: A project to plan, design, build, test, and launch a new website or major website redesign.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates a standard website project with discovery, design, development, testing, content population, and launch preparation tasks.

tasks.title: Define site structure and key pages

templates.title: ERP Implementation
templates.description: A project to implement or roll out an ERP system across one department, business unit, or full company.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates a structured ERP implementation project with requirements, design, configuration, data migration, testing, training, and go-live tasks.

templates.title: Mobile App Development
templates.description: A project to design, build, test, and publish a mobile application.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates a mobile app project with product planning, UI/UX design, development, QA, store readiness, and launch activities.

templates.title: Office Relocation
templates.description: A project to move office operations from one location to another with minimal business disruption.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates an office relocation project covering planning, logistics, vendors, IT readiness, physical move, and operational stabilization.

tasks.title: Set up printers and meeting rooms

templates.title: Marketing Campaign
templates.description: A project to plan and execute a marketing campaign across digital, offline, or mixed channels.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates a campaign project with strategy, content preparation, creative production, launch, monitoring, and closure tasks.

templates.title: Employee Onboarding Program Setup
templates.description: A project to create or improve a standardized onboarding program for new employees.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates a project for designing onboarding structure, documents, responsibilities, training, and rollout.

templates.title: Product Launch
templates.description: A project to prepare and release a new product to market.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates a launch project covering planning, readiness, operational setup, launch execution, and post-launch review.

templates.title: Business Process Improvement
templates.description: A project to review and improve an existing business process for efficiency, quality, control, or speed.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates an improvement project with current-state assessment, redesign, pilot implementation, and performance review.

templates.title: Infrastructure Upgrade
templates.description: A project to upgrade servers, networks, storage, security, or core IT infrastructure.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates an infrastructure project with assessment, design, procurement, implementation, testing, and transition tasks.

templates.title: Training Program Development
templates.description: A project to design and roll out a structured training program for employees, customers, or partners.
templates.wizard_summary: Creates a training project with needs analysis, curriculum design, material preparation, pilot delivery, and rollout tasks.
